codeReview.summary: The implementation covers a single curve-curve hit for simple line segments, but it does not satisfy the feature requirements for multiple intersections and does not store EE interference records in BopDs as required by the feature description.

issues.description: `intersect_ee` returns immediately after the first Newton-refined hit, so any additional intersections on the same pair of edges are never searched. This violates the feature requirement to handle multiple intersections such as circle-circle cases and prevents complete EE results for multi-hit curves.

The test coverage never exercises curved or multi-hit edges despite the feature explicitly requiring support for multiple intersections (e.g. circle-circle). With only straight-segment tests, the current implementation's early-return behavior and sampling limitations go undetected.

The EE routine only returns tuples and never persists `EEInterference` entries into `BopDs`, even though the feature description requires storing intersection parameters for both curves and the crate already provides `BopDs::push_ee_interference`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `rust-bop-worker` skill still instructs workers to run `cargo clippy -p truck-bop` and address warnings, but this mission documents that clippy is intentionally skipped because of pre-existing failures in other workspace crates.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/rust-bop-worker/SKILL.md step 4 requires `cargo clippy -p truck-bop`; `/Volumes/DPC/work/cad/truck-new/.factory/services.yaml` now maps `lint` to `echo "Skipping clippy due to known pre-existing issues in other workspace crates"`; mission `AGENTS.md` also says clippy may fail outside mission scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture docs do not record the EE limitation that this implementation only finds a single hit for curved edge pairs, even though the worker's handoff explicitly called out the missing BopDs storage and the mission had to add a later fix feature for EE multi-intersection.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker handoff `2026-03-15T15-18-31-128Z__ee-intersection-impl__e2feea8c-e1d0-44d6-9ced-ecc3e7ac5a20.json` notes EE storage was not wired; `/Volumes/DPC/work/cad/truck-new/.factory/library/architecture.md` has no EE-specific limitation note, while mission `AGENTS.md` separately documents `EE multi-intersection` as a deferred limitation.

summary: Reviewed the feature transcript, handoff, skill guidance, and commit `58011a4f1c6262aeae8bc316ccc2572b43af73d9`. The implementation is incomplete for the assigned feature: it only proves simple single-hit line cases, returns after the first refined hit, and does not persist EE interference records into `BopDs`, so the feature should fail scrutiny.
